finding_results.notes: Inserted close-third interior microbeats in the opening wake setup so Marisol's sensation/self-assessment recurs before the kitchen confrontation and no long exterior-only run remains.
Rewrote two contradiction-slogan instances into character-specific concrete phrasing (Benny's eulogy and later counsel), leaving one explicit contradiction line for thematic emphasis.
Replaced cinematic meta-language with physical room mechanics (chair scrape stop, phones lifting, whisper/breath texture) to render tension materially.

summary: Applied prose/copyedit fixes for all three packet findings with minimal collateral churn: restored early interiority cadence in close third, removed repeated contradiction formulae while preserving thematic pressure, and converted cinematic abstraction into concrete sensory-social shifts aligned to style constraints.
